name: AI Web Scraper News Briefing Agent using Claude and Notion

parameters.content:
## AI Web Scraper News Briefing Agent using Claude and Notion

This workflow scrapes article URLs from Google Sheets every day, uses Claude to write a structured briefing for each article, saves each briefing to Notion, sends a Slack digest, and logs all results to a Google Sheets log.

## How it works

1. Schedule Trigger fires daily at your chosen time
2. Configure Settings node defines all keys, IDs, and prompts in one place
3. Google Sheets reads the list of article URLs to process
4. HTTP Request fetches the raw text of each article URL
5. Claude AI chain reads the content and writes a structured briefing: headline, summary, why it matters, and a relevance score
6. Notion creates a new briefing page for each article
7. Slack posts a daily digest of all briefings to your channel
8. Google Sheets log appends every briefing for record keeping

## Setup steps

- [ ] **Google Sheets URL list** — Create a sheet with a column named url and paste article URLs one per row
- [ ] **Anthropic credential** — Add your Anthropic API key in n8n credentials as an Anthropic Account
- [ ] **Notion integration** — Add your Notion token and replace YOUR_NOTION_DATABASE_ID in the Configure Settings node
- [ ] **Slack credential** — Add your Slack credentials and replace YOUR_SLACK_CHANNEL with your target channel
- [ ] **Sheet IDs** — Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID and YOUR_LOG_SHEET_ID in Configure Settings
- [ ] **Schedule** — Open the Schedule Trigger and set your preferred time

### Customization

Add more source URLs to the Google Sheets list at any time. Adjust the Claude prompt in Configure Settings to change the briefing format or focus area.

## Trigger and config

The workflow starts on a daily schedule and reads all user-editable settings from the Configure Settings node. Edit only this node to change API keys, IDs, channels, and prompts.

## Scrape and analyse

Reads article URLs from Google Sheets, fetches the page content of each URL, then passes each article to Claude to generate a structured briefing with headline, summary, relevance score, and key insight.

## Store and notify

Saves each Claude briefing as a new Notion page in your briefings database, then sends a Slack digest of all articles and logs every record to Google Sheets for long-term storage.
